Title: Data Analyst
Description:
JOB TITLE: FEATURE & DATA ANALYST

LOCATION: BRUSSELS, BELGIUM

DURATION: AS SOON AS POSSIBLE - End of 2026 with Extension Possible

LANGUAGES: DUTCH(OR) FRENCH AND ENGLISH

WORK REGIME: 100% (FULL-TIME AND HYBRID 2 (OR)3 DAYS ONSITE)




JOB DESCRIPTION

ABOUT THE TEAM

You’ll join our Conversational AI team — a hands-on group building and running scripted flows, transactional end-to-end conversational flows, and owning the full quality assurance cycle. Our QA practice combines LLM-as-a-Judge evaluations with deep production conversation analysis, and we feed everything we learn back into roadmap and content improvements.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

Act as the bridge between business stakeholders and the technical team — gathering, clarifying and translating business requirements into concrete data requirements and implementable solutions.
Conduct deep-dive analyses on conversation data, LLM evaluation output and QA reports, and convert findings into actionable improvements across UX, content and product roadmap.
Take ownership of improvement initiatives end-to-end: coordinate across teams, follow up, chase progress, and make sure things actually ship — not just get recommended.
Present insights and proposals convincingly to stakeholders at all levels, translating complex data findings into clear business language.
Contribute to and continuously sharpen our QA and reporting frameworks, identifying gaps in data coverage and measurement.
Proactively spot trends, edge cases and anomalies in production conversations — and translate them into sprint-ready improvements before they’re flagged by others.




WHO YOU ARE

You’re pro-active and hands-on. You don’t wait to be asked — you spot what’s missing, start the conversation, and drive it to closure. You’re a natural connector, comfortable in rooms with business owners, product managers and engineers alike, and you translate fluently between all of them.
You think in a structured way: from messy data to a clear story, from vague request to concrete requirement. Once you take something on, it gets done. You chase, coordinate and follow up — owning outcomes, not just deliverables. Whether in a slide, a doc or a meeting, you make complex things understandable and proposals easy to say yes to.




WHAT YOU BRING

Proven experience in an analyst role — feature analyst, data analyst, business analyst or similar.
Solid background working with data environments: querying, interpreting, reporting and presenting data outputs.
Hands-on experience with at least one Conversational AI project — you know the landscape, the terminology, and the typical failure modes.
Experience converting stakeholder input into data requirements, user stories or functional specifications.
Ability to independently lead improvement tracks — planning, coordinating, communicating progress and delivering results.
Familiarity with QA thinking: defining what “good” looks like and building ways to measure it.
Bonus: experience with LLM evaluation methods, conversation analytics tooling or NLP-adjacent data work.







WHAT WE OFFER

Direct influence on the quality and direction of live AI-powered customer conversations.
End-to-end ownership — from raw data to stakeholder alignment to shipped improvement.
A small, skilled Conversational AI team that moves fast and values quality thinking.
Work at the frontier of LLM-driven quality assessment, scripted flows and transactional AI.

Autonomy and trust — you’ll own your domain, with results mattering more than process.

Title: Data & Business Analyst
Description:
Who we are




Phinest is a Belgian Management Consulting firm providing tailor-made services for Bel20 and Bel20-like companies.

We help these leading companies deliver their key strategic projects across various sectors (Utilities, Pharmaceutical, Banking & Insurance, Retail, Transport, Public, Telecom).




We combine a human-sized organisation with large-scale impact. You are not just a consultant: you grow with us while making an impact for our clients.

At Phinest, you’ll find the right balance between professional growth, meaningful projects, and a collaborative environment.




Position: Business & Data Analyst




Your Mission:

Join a team at the forefront of the energy transition! As an Energy Business & Data Analyst, you will be the key link between business and IT teams, driving the design, development, and optimization.




Your Responsibilities:

Analyze business needs related to energy management and optimization.
Translate these needs into clear functional specifications for technical teams.
Collect, structure, and analyze data to identify performance drivers.
Collaborate with stakeholders (business, IT, engineering, data) to ensure project success.
Monitor performance indicators and propose continuous improvements.




Your Profile:

A unique mix of business insight and data/IT mindset.
Comfortable with data analysis, modeling, and reporting tools.
Strong ability to bridge technical and non-technical discussions.




What we offer:




Our focus is to develop a long-term collaboration with our talented consultants. Therefore we invest in our people as of day one to support them into a blossoming career within Phinest.

Our Talent Management Services department (a.k.a TMS) is designed and fully dedicated to the development and well-being of our employees.




We also offer:




A company culture focused on well-being
A wide range of trainings and career development opportunities (certification, practical training)
A collaborative, dynamic and fulfilling working atmosphere with a supportive and collaborative team
The opportunity to work with a fast-growing firm and talented people
A competitive remuneration package with fringe benefits
Hybrid workplace: combination of home office and on-site




Join us to make an impact together! Apply now!

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Onze klant is een jonge en ambitieuze speler binnen de internationale sector van magazijnautomatisatie. Achter de schermen van grote, complexe logistieke processen zorgen zij dat alles feilloos verloopt door middel van slimme software en geavanceerde IoT-oplossingen. De sfeer op de werkvloer is open en ondernemend, waardoor innovatieve ideeën direct gehoor krijgen en fouten maken simpelweg gezien wordt als een leermoment.




Door complexe datastromen om te zetten in heldere inzichten, help je mee de toekomst van wereldwijde supply chains vorm te geven. Je komt terecht in een hecht team van software-architecten en developers die samen bouwen aan schaalbare, betrouwbare systemen. Ben jij klaar om als data analyst de data-infrastructuur naar een hoger niveau te tillen? Getriggerd? Lees dan snel verder!




Takenpakket

In deze rol neem jij het voortouw bij het structureren van complexe, operationele data uit hoogtechnologische omgevingen. Jouw dag draait om het bouwen van de perfecte analytische transformatielaag.

Je vertaalt functionele KPI-eisen naar loepzuivere berekeningsregels, zodat het management strategische beslissingen baseert op de juiste data.
Door het ontwerpen van slimme datamodellen en transformatielogica zorg je voor een datastructuur die ook op de lange termijn herbruikbaar blijft.
Met behulp van gerichte Python-scripts en geavanceerde SQL-queries optimaliseer je de database-inrichting voor maximale prestaties.
Je implementeert strenge validatieregels en kwaliteitscontroles, waardoor inconsistenties in de datastromen direct proactief worden opgevangen en opgelost.
In nauw overleg met software architects en DevOps-collega's integreer je versiebeheer om stabiele releases te garanderen.




Profiel

Als data analyst stel je kritische vragen over de herkomst van cijfers en rust je niet voor alles logisch klopt.

Ervaring met data engineering, business intelligence of een soortgelijke technische rol waarin je minstens drie jaar actief bent.
Je beschekt over een uitstekende kennis van SQL en hebt een scherp inzicht in relationele databases en datamodellering.
Collega's omschrijven jou als een analytische denker die vlot communiceert in het Engels en graag over de grenzen van het eigen team heen kijkt.
Affiniteit met of interesse in logistieke processen helpt je om de operationele context sneller te begrijpen.




Aanbod

Wanneer je start als data analyst, krijg je direct de ruimte om impact te maken. Wat mag je concreet verwachten van deze internationale werkgever?

Een aantrekkelijk brutoloon dat perfect aansluit bij jouw ervaring en technische expertise.
Een moderne bedrijfswagen inclusief tankkaart of laadpas voor zorgeloze kilometers, zowel voor werk als privé.
Uitstekende flexibiliteit met de vrijheid om je eigen werkuren in te delen, zodat je kunt werken op de momenten dat jij het meest productief bent.
Maar liefst 32 vakantiedagen per jaar dankzij een fulltime 40-urenweek, waardoor je werk en privé perfect in balans blijven.
Een solide groeps- en hospitalisatieverzekering voor een optimale medische en financiële bescherming van jou en je gezin.
Maaltijdcheques van € 8 per gewerkte dag en nette onkostenvergoedingen die je maandelijkse netto-inkomen extra boosten.
Een mooie jaarlijkse CAO90 bonus wanneer de gezamenlijke organisatiedoelen worden behaald.
Een intensief opleidingstraject door ervaren collega's uit het vak, waardoor je jouw vaardigheden als Analytics Engineer continu aanscherpt.
Up-to-date werkmateriaal waaronder een high-end laptop en een iPhone met bijhorend abonnement.




Zie jij jezelf al schitteren in deze rol van Analytics Engineer?

Geprikkeld door dit verhaal? Solliciteer direct en we plannen een eerste kennismaking in.

Title: Senior Data Analyst
Description:
Salt is currently hiring a Senior Data Analyst with experience in R and Survey programming.




Looking for a B2B contractor, who can start immediately and the contract is for 3 months.




Please see Description below:




Data Modelling & Analytics

Build and maintain predictive models in R (or similar tools) to support quantitative research and consumer insights.
Translate research objectives into structured analytical frameworks and statistical workflows.
Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and reproducibility across studies.

Research Operations & Technical Delivery

Manage data pipelines, survey integrations, and third-party research platforms.
Act as the technical lead for panel providers including PureSpectrum, Cint, and Dynata.
Troubleshoot issues across data collection, processing, and reporting workflows.
Support the development of scalable research infrastructure and automation processes.

Insights & Stakeholder Communication

Turn complex datasets into clear narratives, visualisations, and actionable recommendations.
Create concise, visually engaging presentations that communicate research findings effectively.
Partner with Strategy and Client teams to deliver insight-led recommendations with commercial impact.
Present analytical findings confidently to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Automation & AI Innovation

Implement AI and automation tools to improve analysis and reporting efficiency.
Prototype and test AI-driven approaches to modelling, insight generation, and reporting.
Balance innovation with methodological rigor and data quality standards.

Skills & Experience

5+ years’ experience in quantitative research, analytics, or data science within a research, insights, or consultancy environment.
Strong proficiency in R or equivalent statistical and analytical tools.
Experience with survey programming, logic design, and data validation.
Understanding of APIs, data integrations, and third-party research platforms.
Experience implementing automation or AI-enabled workflows.
Ability to communicate complex analytical concepts clearly and effectively.
Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities and stakeholders simultaneously.

Title: Data Analyst (SQL Mandatory)
Description:
Mission




As a Data Analyst, you transform complex datasets into growth levers for our marketing strategy. You bridge the gap between raw data and commercial reality to optimize customer knowledge and our loyalty programs. Your role is essential in supporting strategic decisions through precise, data-driven analyses.




Key Responsibilities




Data Analysis: Identify customer segments and analyze purchasing habits to detect new commercial opportunities.
Loyalty Tracking: Decipher the behavior of "Bonus Card" holders to measure the impact of our marketing actions.
Business Insights: Translate complex figures and intricate charts into clear language for all audiences, converting them into concrete, actionable business behaviors.
Predictive Modeling: Calculate Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) to anticipate future consumer needs.
Data Storytelling: Create visual dashboards (Looker/Tableau) to make data accessible and intuitive for stakeholders.
Oral Presentation: Communicate your findings in a simplified and pedagogical manner during meetings with both peers and senior management.
Technical Management: Manipulate and structure databases via SQL and BigQuery while ensuring data reliability. Master the Google Cloud environment.
Customer Journey Optimization: Analyze interactions across Web, App, and In-store touchpoints to improve the overall customer experience.




Your Profile




Education: Master’s or Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative field (Business Engineering, Statistics, Computer Science.
Technical Skills: * Mandatory mastery of SQL
Experience with BigQuery or visualization tools (Looker, Tableau) is a strong asset.
Proficiency in the Google Workspace/Cloud environment.
Communication: Exceptional ability to demystify technical analyses for non-expert audiences and translate them into actionable strategies.
Mindset: An analytical spirit combined with a sharp business sense for the retail sector.
Soft Skills: Assertive communicator capable of presenting conclusions with conviction; high attention to details.
Languages: Trilingual in French, Dutch, and English




Our Offer

A full-time permanent contract (CDI)

Competitive Salary & Premium Benefits :

Company car or Mobility Budget.

Smartphone with subscription.

Meal vouchers and giftcards.

Significant discounts on Carrefour groceries.

Role-specific bonuses.

Cafeteria plan and bike leasing (after 1year).

Group and Hospitalization insurance.

Smart Way of Working: Flexible hours and arrangements to support a healthy work-life balance.

Career Growth: Tailor-made training and genuine advancement opportunities within a leading European retailer.

Diversity & Inclusion: At Carrefour, we value all generations and backgrounds. We believe diversity fuels innovation and customer satisfaction.

  • Customer Journey Optimization: Analyze interactions across Web, App, and In-store touchpoints to improve the overall customer experience.


Your Profile


  • Education: Master’s or Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative field (Business Engineering, Statistics, Computer Science.
  • Technical Skills: * Mandatory mastery of SQL
  • Experience with BigQuery or visualization tools (Looker, Tableau) is a strong asset.
  • Proficiency in the Google Workspace/Cloud environment.
  • Communication: Exceptional ability to demystify technical analyses for non-expert audiences and translate them into actionable strategies.
  • Mindset: An analytical spirit combined with a sharp business sense for the retail sector.
  • Soft Skills: Assertive communicator capable of presenting conclusions with conviction; high attention to details.
  • Languages: Trilingual in French, Dutch, and English


Our Offer

A full-time permanent contract (CDI)

Competitive Salary & Premium Benefits :

Company car or Mobility Budget.

Smartphone with subscription.

Meal vouchers and giftcards.

Significant discounts on Carrefour groceries.

Role-specific bonuses.

Cafeteria plan and bike leasing (after 1year).

Group and Hospitalization insurance.

Smart Way of Working: Flexible hours and arrangements to support a healthy work-life balance.

Career Growth: Tailor-made training and genuine advancement opportunities within a leading European retailer.

Diversity & Inclusion: At Carrefour, we value all generations and backgrounds. We believe diversity fuels innovation and customer satisfaction.

Title: Feature & Data Analyst
Description:
afarax is looking for a freelance Feature & Data Analyst. We need you!




The project:

Our client in the banking sector, is seeking an experienced Feature & Data Analyst to strengthen their team.




What you’ll do:

Act as the bridge between business stakeholders and the technical team — gathering, clarifying and translating business requirements into concrete data requirements and implementable solutions.
Conduct deep-dive analyses on conversation data, LLM evaluation output and QA reports, and convert findings into actionable improvements across UX, content and product roadmap.
Take ownership of improvement initiatives end-to-end: coordinate across teams, follow up, chase progress, and make sure things actually ship — not just get recommended.
Present insights and proposals convincingly to stakeholders at all levels, translating complex data findings into clear business language.
Contribute to and continuously sharpen our QA and reporting frameworks, identifying gaps in data coverage and measurement.
Proactively spot trends, edge cases and anomalies in production conversations — and translate them into sprint-ready improvements before they’re flagged by others.




Is this you?

Proven experience in an analyst role — feature analyst, data analyst, business analyst or similar.
Solid background working with data environments: querying, interpreting, reporting and presenting data outputs.
Hands-on experience with at least one Conversational AI project — you know the landscape, the terminology, and the typical failure modes.
Experience converting stakeholder input into data requirements, user stories or functional specifications.
Ability to independently lead improvement tracks — planning, coordinating, communicating progress and delivering results.
Familiarity with QA thinking: defining what “good” looks like and building ways to measure it.
Bonus: experience with LLM evaluation methods, conversation analytics tooling or NLP-adjacent data work.




How afarax supports you?

You benefit from our extensive network
You will have access to projects that fit your expertise
We help and support you throughout your project
We offer the possibility to build a valuable and lasting partnership

Check out more projects on: https://afarax.be/jobs/type/freelance/

Title: Online Data Analyst
Description:
Online Data Analyst

Are you detail-oriented with a passion for research and a good grasp of national and local geography? This freelance role lets you work at your own pace from home!

Role Overview:

Put your research skills to work improving the digital maps that millions of people rely on every day.

You'll conduct web-based evaluations to verify data accuracy, compare information across sources, and ensure the mapping content powering global navigation services is precise and relevant—all while working from home on your own schedule!

Requirements:

Fluency in English and French
Residency in Belgium for the past two years
Familiarity with local business, media, sports, news, social media, and culture in Belgium
Ability to follow guidelines and conduct online research
Flexibility to handle diverse tasks including maps, news, and audio
Daily access to broadband internet, computer, and relevant software
Willingness to work on a freelance basis

Recruitment Process:

To join the program, after you complete your application you will be invited to take an open book qualification exam. We will provide guidelines and learning materials in advance, and you can complete the exam at your convenience within a specific timeframe.

As part of our hiring process, candidates who progress past the initial screening and qualification stages may be asked to complete a third-party identity and background verification. This verification is conducted through a secure external provider and may require you to provide government-issued identification and other documentation at that later stage.

Please note we do not use this information to make initial application screening decisions.

Why join the TELUS Digital AI Community?

Flexibility: Work at your own pace from home
Global impact: Be part of a 1million+ strong AI Community
Innovation: Support machine learning models for world-leading brands
Growth: No previous professional experience required
Long-term opportunity: This is a part-time, long-term, independent freelance position

Equal Opportunity:

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for a contractual relationship without regards to race, colour, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or protected veteran status. At Telus Digital AI, we are proud to offer equal opportunities and are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive community. All aspects of selection are based on applicants’ qualifications, merits, competence, and performance without regards to any characteristic related to diversity.

Apply today to join our dynamic and innovative team!

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
SII Belgium is currently seeking a highly skilled and experienced Data Analyst to join our team. As a Data Analyst, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and implementing big data solutions to support business objectives. You will work with large, complex data sets and be responsible for analyzing and interpreting data to identify trends and insights. You would join various teams working in the Energy, Defense, Banking or Telecom sectors.

SII is a European digital and engineering services company of 16,000 experts. SII Belgium supports large businesses in adopting new technologies and innovation management. SII values empowerment and entrepreneurship, providing a fulfilling work environment for employees. Our mission is to contribute to the design and development of future products and services for customers. SII is committed to a sustainable digital world and is recognized as a Great Workplace.  

Key Responsibilities:


Develop and maintain big data solutions to support business objectives
Analyze and interpret large, complex data sets to identify trends and insights
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify and implement data-driven solutions
Create and maintain data visualization and reporting tools to support decision-making
Integration between enterprise architecture and data collection.
Stay up to date with industry trends and technologies to identify new opportunities for data analysis


Qualifications:


You hold a bachelor’s or master’s degree in IT.
Minimum of 3 years of experience working with data technologies
Strong analytical skills and experience using statistical techniques to interpret data
Experience with data visualization and reporting tools such as Tableau and Power BI
Excellent communication and collaboration skills
Strong problem-solving abilities and attention to detail
You are fluent in Dutch and/or French, and fluent in English.


We offer:


A challenging and varied role in a growing company
Opportunity to work with the latest technologies
Competitive salary and benefits
Opportunity to improve your skills and knowledge through training and education
Warm and open company culture, supported by an international group


If you are passionate about Data and want to work in a dynamic and fast-paced environment, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity at SII Belgium. Let's tech together !

Title: Data Analyst Confirmé (H/F)
Description:
Description Du Poste

Vous serez intégré(e) dans une équipe de consultants innovants et motivés, composée de Business Analysts, Data Scientists et Data Engineers spécialisés sur les problématiques Data Analytics. À ce titre, vous interviendrez de façon opérationnelle sur des missions de conseil autour des sujets de transformation Data Analytics, de retraitement et modélisation de données et de représentation visuelle de la donnée pour adresser des problématiques métiers.

Vous serez notamment en charge de :


Comprendre les problématiques métier,
Collecter et traiter les données en vue de l'analyse, incluant notamment la création de variables agrégées et complémentaires aux données brutes,
Automatiser et d’industrialiser les retraitements effectués sur les données,
Représenter les résultats dans un outil de restitution visuelle de façon ergonomique et intuitive,
Restituer les analyses au client notamment pas la création d’indicateurs pertinents pour les questions stratégiques des entreprises


PROFIL RECHERCHE

Diplômé d'une école d'ingénieurs ou équivalent (Bac +5), vous justifiez d’a minima 2 ans d’expérience réussis en tant que data analyst :


Vous possédez une bonne connaissance des outils et méthodologies de Data Analytics, incluant notamment des bases techniques (modèles de données, langage SQL, …) mais également méthodologiques,
Vous possédez une connaissance approfondie d'Excel et maitrisez les langages statistiques tels que R, Python ou SAS,
Une connaissance d'un logiciel ou langage dédié à la Data Visualization (Tableau, Qliksense ou Qlickview, Microsoft Power BI…) ainsi que des compétences en automatisation (VBA par exemple) seraient un plus.


PROCESSUS DE RECRUTEMENT


Échangez avec un ou une chargée de recrutement pour un premier contact téléphonique
Rencontrez un ou une Ingénieure d’Affaires (Business Manager) sur vos souhaits d’évolution
Approfondissez avec nos responsables et directeurs d’agence pour connaître la vision de l'agence


Selon votre profil, des tests ou entretiens techniques pourront vous être demandés. Tout au long du processus, vous pourrez échanger avec nos consultants pour en savoir + sur leur quotidien chez nous !

PACKAGE SALARIAL

Chez Extia Belgique IT, la transparence fait partie intégrante de l'expérience positive, voici un aperçu des éléments de package salarial dont peuvent profiter nos collaborateurs, sous réserve d'éligibilité

👛 Voiture de société ou budget mobilité ✨ Chèques repas & Ecocheque 🎁 Assurance groupe 🎉 Frais de représentation 📈 Plan cafétéria / Flex Income Plan 🚀 Primes d'apport d'affaire, de cooptation et de formation 🌍 20 jours de congés légaux + 12 jours de récupération

Ces informations sont communiquées à titre indicatif et seront abordées plus en détails lors du processus de recrutement.

LES PETITS PLUS

🎉 250 événements par an pour rencontrer tes collègues et des locaux feel good 📢 Des formations, conférences et une plateforme d'e-learning avec LinkedIn pour monter en compétences #greatplacetolearn 👩‍ Des Communautés Métiers et du Mentorat pour partager son expertise et en apprendre sur de nombreux sujets #greatplacetoshare 🕹️ Une communauté de e-sport : Extia Gaming ! #greatplacetoplay 🌏 Envie d’évoluer ? Grâce à notre politique de mobilité interne, explorez de nouvelles opportunités en Belgique ou dans l’un de nos 7 autres pays !

Title: BI Analyst
Description:
Welcome at Yuzzu !







Yuzzu, an insurance broker, offers a dynamic and welcoming work environment, where clear communication and respect for our commitments are at the heart of our culture. As a member of the AXA Group, we place the quality of human relationships and innovation at the center of our priorities. This is reflected in our values of dynamism, simplicity, and empathy.







Would you like to invest your energy and talent in a growing company? Look at our vacancies and apply by sending your CV and cover letter to recruitment@yuzzu.be!







Yuzzu is currently seeking a BI Analyst







Role Overview







We are looking for a Data Analyst to support business decision-making through data extraction, reporting, and dashboard development. The ideal candidate will be responsible for transforming data into actionable insights, with a strong focus on Power BI and reporting automation.




You will report to the Head of Data & Reporting.







Which are your responsibilities?







As a BI Analyst, you will:

Develop, maintain, and improve dashboards and reports (primarily in Power BI)
Perform data extraction, transformation, and validation from multiple data sources
Ensure data quality, consistency, and reliability across reports
Automate recurring reporting processes to improve efficiency
Translate business needs into data models and reporting solutions
Work closely with stakeholders to understand reporting requirements
Provide insights and recommendations based on data analysis
Document data definitions, processes, and reporting logic







What are your skills and experiences?







Technical skills:

Strong experience with Power BI (data modeling, DAX, dashboards)
Basic knowledge of Python is required
Basic knowledge of SAS is required
Proficiency in SQL for data extraction and manipulation
Good knowledge of Excel (advanced formulas, pivot tables, Power Query)
Understanding of data modeling and relational databases
Experience with ETL processes or data preparation tools
Familiarity with data warehousing concepts is a plus
Familiarity with AWS Sagemaker is a plus







Soft skills:

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Attention to detail and data accuracy
Ability to communicate insights clearly to non-technical stakeholders
Proactive mindset and ability to work independently
Strong organizational and time management skills
Curiosity and willingness to continuously learn




What is your profile?




Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data, Business, Economics, Engineering, or related field
2–5 years of experience in data analysis / business intelligence (adjust if needed)
Experience working with business stakeholders




What do we offer?




An attractive remuneration package
A professional but friendly and positive working environment
A job with a wide range of aspects
The potential to have a strong autonomy, in line with your skills and capacity
Training and ongoing coaching







Who is Yuzzu?







As a member of the AXA Group, one of the world's largest financial groups, Yuzzu is a major insurance broker in the direct insurance market in Belgium. Our 180 employees work hard every day to guarantee high-quality, personalised service to our customers and partners.




We are a company on a human scale. Whether at our head office, at the Trône site in Brussels or in our six shops across Belgium, there is a friendly and relaxed atmosphere, reflecting our status as a young and growing company.




Yuzzu attaches great importance to its staff and the quality of interpersonal relations. Because it takes a solid team to meet everyday challenges and translate them into effective and innovative solutions for our customers. Do you want to be part of our team? Apply now!

Title: Data Annotator
Description:
Job Role: Data Annotator(Luxembourgish)

Engagement: Freelancing

Time commitment : 4-5 hours per day

Rate per hour - 20 USD per hour







We are looking for Luxembourgish) native language experts to support an upcoming audio evaluation and multilingual benchmarking initiative.




This opportunity is ideal for linguists and language professionals interested in working on AI‑driven speech technologies, including Text‑to‑Speech (TTS) and Speech‑to‑Text (STT) systems.




Scope of Work

✅ Audio Evaluation

Review and assess model outputs for TTS and STT quality, including accuracy, pronunciation, and naturalness.

✅ Multilingual Benchmarking

Create and validate evaluation benchmarks aligned with local language usage, cultural context, and regional expectations.

Effort Required

Effort may increase based on project needs and quality requirements

Ideal Candidate Profile

Native fluency in the Luxembourgish language and English proficiency.
Strong understanding of grammar, pronunciation, and regional variations
Prior experience in annotation, linguistic evaluation, QA, or AI/LLM evaluation preferred
Ability to complete structured evaluation tasks within defined timelines.

Integration between enterprise architecture and data collection.
Stay up to date with industry trends and technologies to identify new opportunities for data analysis


Qualifications


You hold a bachelor’s or master’s degree in IT.
Minimum of 3 years of experience working with data technologies
Strong analytical skills and experience using statistical techniques to interpret data
Experience with data visualization and reporting tools such as Tableau and Power BI
Excellent communication and collaboration skills
Strong problem-solving abilities and attention to detail
You are fluent in Dutch and/or French, and fluent in English.


We Offer


A challenging and varied role in a growing company
Opportunity to work with the latest technologies
Competitive salary and benefits
Opportunity to improve your skills and knowledge through training and education
Warm and open company culture, supported by an international group


If you are passionate about Data and want to work in a dynamic and fast-paced environment, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity at SII Belgium. Let's tech together !

Title: Junior Data Analyst
Description:
Over je missie

Economische en financiële data vertalen naar betrouwbare businessinzichten.

Analyse it, optimize it! Bij Trends Business Information (TBI) maken we economische en financiële data relevant, begrijpbaar en toepasbaar voor bedrijven en professionals.







Modelleren & analyseren

Je analyseert financiële en economische datapunten en beheert het scoremodel van onze dataproducten. Je past diverse analysetechnieken toe, waaronder AI, en vertaalt resultaten naar concreet toepasbare inzichten. Je werkt mee aan de ontwikkeling en optimalisatie van modellen en begeleidt verbeteringen na implementatie.




Inzichten omzetten naar businessimpact

Je kent de data grondig en vertaalt analyses naar heldere input voor sales en klanten. Je documenteert en bewaakt KPI’s, indicatoren en performantiestandaarden. Daarnaast volg je Belgische concurrentie en internationale rapporten op en breng je relevante trends in kaart.




Samenwerken & vernieuwen

Je werkt nauw samen met Product, ICT, Sales, Marketing en Management binnen TBI. In overleg met de marketing manager lever je input voor marketing‑ en communicatiecampagnes.




Wat breng je mee

Sterke inhoudelijke expertise

Je beschikt over een degelijke kennis van econometrie, statistiek en data‑analyse en hebt ervaring met financiële bedrijfsgegevens (zoals balansen en tendensen) en B2B‑dataproducten. Je volgt de economische actualiteit en hebt interesse in innovatie binnen data en technologie

Analytische & technologische slagkracht

Je hebt affiniteit met data, ICT, sales en marketing en ervaring met zowel klassieke als AI‑gedreven analysemethodes. Je werkt vlot met tools zoals Excel en PowerPoint en voelt je thuis in analytische omgevingen; je denkt digitaal en online‑gericht.

Gestructureerd en met oog voor resultaat

Je werkt nauwkeurig en projectmatig aan betrouwbare data‑inzichten, functioneert zelfstandig binnen je expertise en stemt vlot af met collega’s uit verschillende afdelingen om maximale businesswaarde te creëen.

Communicatief sterk

Je communiceert helder en professioneel en beheerst het Nederlands, Frans en Engels goed, zowel mondeling als schriftelijk.




Waarom Roularta

Bouw samen aan de kwaliteitsmedia van morgen.

Bij Roularta stap je in een (media)wereld waar innovatie koning is. Je werkt er in een digitale omgeving die snel beweegt. Hier mag je springen, vallen, opstaan en weer doorgaan, want dat is hoe we samen innoveren. En met de open leercultuur van Roularta groeien je skills sneller dan bamboe.

Wees jezelf

Dat doen je collega’s ook. Geniet van de groene werkplek, afterwork drinks, een unieke blik achter de schermen van de televisiestudio van Trends Z, onze Bar Jos waar je op terras met collega's luncht en een wedstrijdje kicker. Krijg de ruimte om te groeien en nieuwe talenten te ontdekken. En speel mee in een beursgenoteerd familiebedrijf dat je bijdrage niet alleen ziet, maar ook viert.

Title: Product Data Analyst
Description:
Coinspaid Solutions is a fintech company building blockchain payment infrastructure for the global economy.

We design, implement, and scale payment systems that connect digital assets with real-world financial operations. Our solutions help businesses and financial institutions operate efficiently in the evolving digital asset landscape.

For over 11 years, we’ve been developing products that bring crypto payments closer to mainstream adoption. Today, our team includes 350+ professionals working remotely across multiple countries.

We combine the pace of fintech with a long-term approach to building products, teams, and careers. As a remote-first company, we give people flexibility in how they work while maintaining strong collaboration and shared ownership across teams.

🏆 In 2026, Coinspaid was recognized as Best Corporate Culture in the Blockchain Industry in Europe, reflecting our focus on ownership, trust, and collaboration.







This role will be allocated into the product department.




Product Data Analyst (Exchange & Blockchain)

Why this role stands out

For analysts who want to move beyond reporting and one-off data pulls, this role offers direct influence on product decisions and measurable product impact.

A true product-facing analytics role, not just reporting support.
Work with exchange, trading, and blockchain / digital asset data to solve high-impact analytical problems and turn insights into product improvements.
Partner closely with Product and Engineering on feature performance, execution quality, and product decisions.
Join an experienced, collaborative team with strong onboarding into the product, market mechanics, and domain specifics.
Comprehensive training in crypto and blockchain, covering all domain knowledge needed to succeed in the role.




Responsibilities:

Data-Driven Decision Support
Define and maintain key product indicators and a structured metrics tree to ensure consistent measurement across exchange and trading operations.
Prepare, visualize, and clearly present data needed for informed and timely decision-making.
Build informative dashboards and reports in Tableau for product, operational, and leadership teams.




Operational Efficiency & Quality Monitoring
Monitor product and trading performance by analyzing core metrics, feature output, execution quality, and market behavior.
Identify inefficiencies, anomalies, or risks — including suboptimal liquidity providers, algorithm behavior issues, or operational bottlenecks.
Evaluate the performance of trading algorithms and extract actionable insights to improve execution quality and profitability.




Advanced Analytical Work
Conduct statistical and quantitative analyses, including back-tests, regressions, and time-series evaluations to validate hypotheses and support product improvements.
Perform ad-hoc deep-dive analyses based on business and operational requests.
Prepare new analytical reports and implement alerting mechanisms for key metrics and deviations.




Cross-Team Collaboration
Work closely with product and engineering teams to define analytical requirements and support a data-driven approach across the organization.




Requirements:

3+ years of proven experience as a Data Analyst, Business Intelligence Analyst, or similar quantitative role.
Direct, hands-on experience (2+ years) analyzing data related to trading, exchange, and liquidity operations in financial markets (e.g., FX, Crypto, Securities, Commodities). This includes:
Analysis of Order Book data and tick-level trading data
Analyzing metrics related to execution and price quality, slippage, latency, spread, markups and trading volumes
Greatly desirable - experience with Market Microstructure concepts
Experience working in a company with product management and data-driven approach, understanding of product metrics, and participation in their development.




Technical Proficiency:

Expertise in SQL for complex querying, data extraction, and performance optimization (writing efficient queries on large datasets is critical).
Advanced proficiency in Python (or R) for data manipulation, statistical analysis, and modeling.
Demonstrated ability to create high-impact, interactive data visualizations and dashboards using tools like Tableau, Power BI, or similar.




Analytical Skills:

Strong statistical foundation and ability to apply statistical methods to product and business problems (e.g., A/B testing, back-testing, regression analysis, time series analysis).
Proven ability to identify, analyze, and interpret complex data patterns, trends, and potential issues within trading data.




Domain Knowledge:

Solid understanding of financial products and market concepts (e.g., markups management, margin, P&L calculation, bid/ask spread, market depth, execution types, etc).
Familiarity with data integrity, reconciliation, and validation processes for sensitive financial data.




Nice to have:

Quantitative Analysis Background:
Experience in developing, back-testing, or validating execution strategies or pricing models (e.g., using historical market data).
Familiarity with risk metrics specific to trading (stress testing, exposure limits).
Experience working with data from High-Frequency Trading (HFT) systems or low-latency exchange environments.




Why should you choose CoinsPaid?

You’ll be joining a company that is actively shaping its space – with enough scale to matter and enough room to make an impact.

At Coinspaid, people are expected to think, contribute, and take ownership – and are supported in doing so.

We focus on flexibility, wellbeing, and long-term growth – without overcomplicating how benefits work.

Flexible Benefits

Benefit Bar – up to €250/month
A flexible monthly budget you can use for what matters most to you – from sports and mental health to coworking, home office, or medical-related expenses.

Work & Flexibility

Fully remote work from almost anywhere
Optional offices and relocation support
Flexible, async-friendly environment

Growth & Learning

Budget for courses, certifications, and professional development
Language learning support
Cross-team learning and knowledge sharing

Wellbeing & Support

Medical insurance or reimbursement depending on location
Access to mental health support
Financial support for important life events

Extras

Merch shop with rewards system
Team offsites and company events




Sounds good? Well then, we can’t wait to see your resume!

To learn more please visit: https://coinspaid.com/about-us/ & https://coinspaid.com/careers/

Title: Business Intelligence Analyst
Description:
WHAT IS CREAM ALL ABOUT?

We could be a Cream Factory, a cooking blog or even a detective agency…

But in reality, we are a Business & Technology consulting company, active in large organizations and industry leaders in Banking, Insurance, Telecom, Energy, & Transport.

The Cream recipe

• 1/3 Personal development • 1/3 Collective intelligence • 1/3 Intrapreneurship • Bonus ingredient: some passionate colleagues




YOUR FUTURE PROJECTS :

Like Teddy, Business Analyst Business Intelligence at Cream, translate the BI needs of the business teams in specifications for the IT department, for both small demands or as part of larger projects (contributions or BI project). Your tasks will be :

Act as person of contact between Business Engineering Teams and the Development Team
Define the business specifications for BI needs
Participation in (or management of) BI projects, or on the BI tracks of other projects for the engineering activities (requirement definition, impact analysis, process definition), while representing the BI vision (and BI target architecture) that has been defined
Collaboration with data delivery experts to deliver on projects
Understand business requirements and build a functional analysis which covers needs of the business according to our BI reference architecture
Collaborate with the development team




WHAT DO WE EXPECT FROM OUR CONSULTANT ?

You have a Master degree in Computer Sciences or equivalent by experience
You have at least 2 years of experience in data and business analysis
You have good knowledge in BI techniques and tools (BO, SAS, Cognos...)
You have a cultural openness and adaptability, you are rigorous, customer oriented, and you have high communication skills and analytical skills
You are polyvalent and can adapt easily to quickly changing environment
You are capable to think out of the box and maintain in the meantime a pragmatic approach
You are able to work with autonomy while being also a great team player
You are fluent in French and English; a good knowledge of Dutch is an asset
You are committed to travelling abroad occasionally upon the client’s request




WHY SHOULD YOU TASTE THE LIME FLAVOR ?

A strong learning environment: tribes, training budget
Career follow-up with dedicated Business Managers and an associate plan
Attractive benefits package (mobility plan, meal vouchers, insurances,...)
Hybrid working model: client working, home working & Cream working
Strong CSR commitments, with recognized labels in environmental responsibility and diversity & inclusion.
A consulting company of around 200 Creamers, located in the center of Brussels




Our recruitment process is clear and structured, with three steps and feedback throughout.

Cream Consulting is committed to equal opportunities. If you need any specific accommodation to fully participate in the recruitment process or the interview, please let us know.

Think this role is a match? Apply and let’s talk, or explore our other opportunities at Cream.

Title: Data Analyst (m/f/d)
Description:
Company Description

About EIT RawMaterials

As the world moves towards a greener future, the demand for raw materials—minerals and metals—is set to increase immensely over the next three decades. Europe faces a critical challenge in securing a stable supply of these essential resources. This challenge is where EIT RawMaterials steps in.

EIT RawMaterials is at the forefront of driving innovation and sustainability in the raw materials sector. As an Innovation Community within the European Institute of Innovation and Technology (EIT), we collaborate with over 300 partners across industry, academia, and research institutes. Together, we forge dynamic, long-term partnerships to develop innovative solutions that meet Europe's growing demand for raw materials

Position

Role Overview

The Data Analyst (m/f/d) in the Innovation and Product Development Team supports data‑driven decision‑making by transforming complex commodities and market data into clear, actionable insights. The role focuses on building high‑quality dashboards, analysing trends in minerals and metals markets, and working closely with internal stakeholders to deliver reliable reporting, meaningful insights, and self‑service analytics solutions that support innovation, strategy, and product development activities.

Tasks And Responsibilities


Data Visualisation & Reporting
Design, build and maintain interactive dashboards and reports (e.g. in Power BI, Tableau, Qlik, or similar tools) for internal stakeholders.
Translate complex commodities market data (esp. minerals and metals) into clear, user-friendly visual narratives.
Develop standardised reporting templates and data visualisation guidelines to ensure a consistent look-and-feel and interpretation.
Implement self-service BI solutions, enabling non-technical users to explore and filter data independently.
Continuously improve and iterate on dashboards based on user feedback and changing business needs.
Data Analysis & Insights Generation
Perform exploratory data analysis on commodity price data, market indices, supply-demand indicators, and other relevant datasets.
Identify patterns, trends, correlations, and anomalies in raw, advanced and critical materials markets.
Prepare ad-hoc analyses and visualisations to support strategic projects, management decisions, and external reporting.
Develop KPIs and metrics to monitor market developments and internal performance indicators.
Summarise findings in clear, concise insight reports, including visual storytelling and key messages tailored to the audience.
Data Management & Engineering Collaboration
Work closely with other teams or experts to ensure reliable data pipelines, from data ingestion to visualisation.
Contribute to the design of data models, semantic layers, and datasets optimised for BI and visualisation tools.
Help define and maintain data quality checks (e.g. completeness, consistency, timeliness) for commodities and market data.
Support integration of external data sources (market feeds, APIs, databases, files) into the analytics environment.
Document data sources, definitions, transformations and business logic used in dashboards and reports.
Stakeholder Engagement & Consulting
Act as a trusted partner for internal stakeholders (e.g. business development, strategy, innovation, procurement, finance).
Work with stakeholders to refine requirements, prioritise dashboard features, and understand decision-making needs.
Provide training and guidance to colleagues on how to interpret and use dashboards and visualisations.
Present key findings and dashboards to non-technical audiences, explaining methodology, assumptions, and limitations.
Critically review data to spot errors, inconsistencies, and anomalies in large datasets.
Collect and structure user feedback to drive continuous improvement of analytics products.
Governance, Standards & Innovation
Contribute to best practices and standards for data visualisation, data storytelling, and reporting within the organisation.
Ensure compliance with data governance, security and privacy policies.
Stay up to date on tools, methods and trends in data visualisation, BI and commodities analytics.
Prototype and test new visualisation approaches (e.g. advanced charts, geospatial visualisations, scenario simulations).


Requirements & Skills


Education & Background
Degree in Computer Science, Data/Information Systems, Data Science, Statistics, Economics, Engineering, or similar quantitative field.
Equivalent experience in data analytics and visualisation is also considered.
Professional Experience
3+ years in a Data Analyst, BI Analyst, or Visualisation-focused role.
Any consulting background would be appreciated
Experience with commodities/commodity market data, ideally in minerals or metals.
Strong background in analysing prices, indices, supply–demand, trading or risk-related datasets.
Exposure to raw, advanced or critical materials is a plus.
Proven ability to deliver business-relevant dashboards and insights.
Exposure to Market Intelligence topics is a plus
Technical Skills – Must Have
Data Visualisation: Advanced skills in Power BI, Tableau, Qlik, or Looker, including modelling and complex calculations.
Analysis & Querying: Strong SQL + experience with Python (pandas, plotly, matplotlib) or R.
Data Infrastructure: Understanding of databases, ETL/ELT, APIs, and preferably cloud environments (Azure, AWS, GCP).
Data Modelling & Quality: Ability to build reporting models and ensure data quality and validation.
Excel: Advanced user (Power Query, pivot tables, formulas).
Technical Skills – Nice to Have
Time‑series forecasting for commodity prices.
Experience with financial/market data feeds & APIs.
Geospatial visualisation skills (GIS, maps).
Familiarity with Git or collaborative development.
Understanding of risk analytics or scenario modelling.


Other Information

Additional Information & Our Recruitment Process


Commitment to Diversity: EIT RawMaterials is committed to diversity and inclusion. We encourage applications from all qualified individuals, regardless of background.
Employment Type: Temporary Position on a two-year contract with the possibility of extension.
Position Location: Germany, Belgium, Poland, Italy, Slovenia, Latvia, Finland, Greece, Hungary and Austria

HTML:
Company Description

About EIT RawMaterials

As the world moves towards a greener future, the demand for raw materials—minerals and metals—is set to increase immensely over the next three decades. Europe faces a critical challenge in securing a stable supply of these essential resources. This challenge is where EIT RawMaterials steps in.

EIT RawMaterials is at the forefront of driving innovation and sustainability in the raw materials sector. As an Innovation Community within the European Institute of Innovation and Technology (EIT), we collaborate with over 300 partners across industry, academia, and research institutes. Together, we forge dynamic, long-term partnerships to develop innovative solutions that meet Europe's growing demand for raw materials

Position

Role Overview

The Data Analyst (m/f/d) in the Innovation and Product Development Team supports data‑driven decision‑making by transforming complex commodities and market data into clear, actionable insights. The role focuses on building high‑quality dashboards, analysing trends in minerals and metals markets, and working closely with internal stakeholders to deliver reliable reporting, meaningful insights, and self‑service analytics solutions that support innovation, strategy, and product development activities.

Tasks And Responsibilities

  • Data Visualisation & Reporting
  • Design, build and maintain interactive dashboards and reports (e.g. in Power BI, Tableau, Qlik, or similar tools) for internal stakeholders.
  • Translate complex commodities market data (esp. minerals and metals) into clear, user-friendly visual narratives.
  • Develop standardised reporting templates and data visualisation guidelines to ensure a consistent look-and-feel and interpretation.
  • Implement self-service BI solutions, enabling non-technical users to explore and filter data independently.
  • Continuously improve and iterate on dashboards based on user feedback and changing business needs.
  • Data Analysis & Insights Generation
  • Perform exploratory data analysis on commodity price data, market indices, supply-demand indicators, and other relevant datasets.
  • Identify patterns, trends, correlations, and anomalies in raw, advanced and critical materials markets.
  • Prepare ad-hoc analyses and visualisations to support strategic projects, management decisions, and external reporting.
  • Develop KPIs and metrics to monitor market developments and internal performance indicators.
  • Summarise findings in clear, concise insight reports, including visual storytelling and key messages tailored to the audience.
  • Data Management & Engineering Collaboration
  • Work closely with other teams or experts to ensure reliable data pipelines, from data ingestion to visualisation.
  • Contribute to the design of data models, semantic layers, and datasets optimised for BI and visualisation tools.
  • Help define and maintain data quality checks (e.g. completeness, consistency, timeliness) for commodities and market data.
  • Support integration of external data sources (market feeds, APIs, databases, files) into the analytics environment.
  • Document data sources, definitions, transformations and business logic used in dashboards and reports.
  • Stakeholder Engagement & Consulting
  • Act as a trusted partner for internal stakeholders (e.g. business development, strategy, innovation, procurement, finance).
  • Work with stakeholders to refine requirements, prioritise dashboard features, and understand decision-making needs.
  • Provide training and guidance to colleagues on how to interpret and use dashboards and visualisations.
  • Present key findings and dashboards to non-technical audiences, explaining methodology, assumptions, and limitations.
  • Critically review data to spot errors, inconsistencies, and anomalies in large datasets.
  • Collect and structure user feedback to drive continuous improvement of analytics products.
  • Governance, Standards & Innovation
  • Contribute to best practices and standards for data visualisation, data storytelling, and reporting within the organisation.
  • Ensure compliance with data governance, security and privacy policies.
  • Stay up to date on tools, methods and trends in data visualisation, BI and commodities analytics.
  • Prototype and test new visualisation approaches (e.g. advanced charts, geospatial visualisations, scenario simulations).

Requirements & Skills

  • Education & Background
  • Degree in Computer Science, Data/Information Systems, Data Science, Statistics, Economics, Engineering, or similar quantitative field.
  • Equivalent experience in data analytics and visualisation is also considered.
  • Professional Experience
  • 3+ years in a Data Analyst, BI Analyst, or Visualisation-focused role.
  • Any consulting background would be appreciated
  • Experience with commodities/commodity market data, ideally in minerals or metals.
  • Strong background in analysing prices, indices, supply–demand, trading or risk-related datasets.
  • Exposure to raw, advanced or critical materials is a plus.
  • Proven ability to deliver business-relevant dashboards and insights.
  • Exposure to Market Intelligence topics is a plus
  • Technical Skills – Must Have
  • Data Visualisation: Advanced skills in Power BI, Tableau, Qlik, or Looker, including modelling and complex calculations.
  • Analysis & Querying: Strong SQL + experience with Python (pandas, plotly, matplotlib) or R.
  • Data Infrastructure: Understanding of databases, ETL/ELT, APIs, and preferably cloud environments (Azure, AWS, GCP).
  • Data Modelling & Quality: Ability to build reporting models and ensure data quality and validation.
  • Excel: Advanced user (Power Query, pivot tables, formulas).
  • Technical Skills – Nice to Have
  • Time‑series forecasting for commodity prices.
  • Experience with financial/market data feeds & APIs.
  • Geospatial visualisation skills (GIS, maps).
  • Familiarity with Git or collaborative development.
  • Understanding of risk analytics or scenario modelling.

Other Information

Additional Information & Our Recruitment Process

  • Commitment to Diversity: EIT RawMaterials is committed to diversity and inclusion. We encourage applications from all qualified individuals, regardless of background.
  • Employment Type: Temporary Position on a two-year contract with the possibility of extension.
  • Position Location: Germany, Belgium, Poland, Italy, Slovenia, Latvia, Finland, Greece, Hungary and Austria

The position will stay open until a successful candidate is chosen.

  • Application Review: Our team thoroughly reviews each application. Please make sure to submit your CV in English.
  • Initial Interview (30 minutes): Meet with the hiring manager and recruitment team.
  • Second Interview (60 minutes): Second interview with a presentation on a relevant topic to the hiring manager and the HR team.
  • Offer: If successful, receive an offer to join our team.

Title: Data Analyst - Wyre (Joint Venture Telenet x Fluvius)
Description:
Job Description

Welcome to Wyre, a brand-new infrastructure company in the market with the mission of successfully rolling out the network of the future. Wyre made its debut on July 1, 2023, and was born from a powerful collaboration between two leading companies: Telenet and Fluvius.

At Wyre, we aim to create an inclusive environment where everyone feels welcome, regardless of background, gender, ethnicity, or any disabilities. We are proud of our identity in which our corporate values – Be Ambitious, Be Brave, Be Real & Be One – are fully embraced. These values are the result of teamwork and guide us in achieving our goals and strengthening our culture.

Since personal growth is actively encouraged within Wyre, we are ready to support you in reaching your full potential through internal career opportunities and a wide range of learning opportunities. If you are looking for an exciting and challenging environment where you can contribute to a growth story, then Wyre is the place for you.

Working In The Data & Insights Team

The Data & Insights team is the beating heart of Wyre, enabling the organization to steer daily operational and business activities by guiding, ensuring, improving, and standardizing projects, processes, and changes in tools. The Data & Insights team, also part of BNT, shapes Wyre's data strategy and architecture and helps the business make informed, data-driven decisions by providing analytics, actionable insights and reporting. 

The Data & Insights team is looking for a Data Analyst to strengthen its team.

Working as a Data Analyst

As a Data Analyst, you support the business with a wide range of data-related questions and help translate insights into concrete actions. You work closely with various departments, ensuring they can rely on clear analyses, reliable reporting, and well-founded recommendations.

You provide support for ad hoc requests, responding quickly and accurately to specific information needs. At the same time, you contribute to building structural, long-term solutions that strengthen the organization’s data maturity.

In addition, you play an important role within the Data & Insights team itself. You contribute to the further development and optimization of data models, dashboards, definitions, and processes, helping to safeguard the “single source of truth.” In this way, you combine operational support with strategic impact and actively contribute to building a future-oriented data organization.

Your Responsibilities


You gather, query, clean, validate, and manipulate data from various sources, transforming it into actionable insights, reports, and dashboards.
You define, build, and automate dashboards relevant to the topics you work on, ensuring they deliver value and clarity.
You develop proactive partnerships with stakeholders, ensuring data is leveraged as efficiently and effectively as possible to meet their needs.
You conduct ad-hoc analyses while contributing to long-term strategic initiatives.
You actively promote the implementation of data-driven solutions and help elevate data skills and maturity within the organization.
You collaborate closely with data engineers and analytics engineers and actively contribute to Wyre’s data landscape.
You play an active role in the data community within Wyre, contributing through knowledge sharing, coaching, and inspiring others.


Our Ideal Candidate


You hold a master’s degree in a relevant field and have 3 to 5 years of experience as a data analyst or can demonstrate equivalent experience.
You communicate fluently in English, both verbally and in writing, and know how to adapt your message to your audience. Knowledge of Dutch is a plus.
You have proven experience with leading dashboarding tools such as Qlik Sense, Power BI, or Tableau. (Nice to have)
You have strong SQL skills (Must have). Experience with Snowflake or other cloud data warehouses is a strong asset. (Very nice to have)
Experience with DBT is a plus. (Nice to have)
You are familiar with common software engineering practices, such as version control (e.g., Git – nice to have).
You combine strong analytical skills with attention to detail, energy, and a positive, solution-oriented mindset.
You know how to bring business stakeholders along in your story and have a proven ability to strengthen a data-driven culture within the organization.
You are a strong communicator who can clearly translate complex topics for both technical and non-technical audiences.


What We Offer


You join a company that invests fully in you and optimizes the work environment according to your needs. This allows you to develop yourself while also maintaining a work-life balance.
You have full autonomy to further develop your expertise. We encourage your personal growth with internal mobility opportunities and extensive learning possibilities but also give you the chance to hit the pause button or explore a completely different path over time.
You enjoy the company of colleagues who are just as passionate as you are.  
You receive a competitive gross monthly salary depending on your experience, complemented by numerous fringe benefits.


Get Wyred, apply now!

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Don’t settle for just any consulting company, choose the one that’s right for you!




At Data Wizards, we value perspeverance, curiosity, creativity, integrity and excellence. In that sense, we are looking for passionate AI & data professionals who want to help companies navigate the transition the world is facing today, and who want to be part of the Wizard adventure we are building.




On our side, we do our best to find exciting, challenging and meaningful projects for you. Today, we work with companies of all sizes, across various sectors, where we believe our work brings real value and purpose.




We are continuously on the lookout for bright data engineers, data scientists, machine learning engineers, AI engineers, and data analysts. But this job description is for Data Analysts out there feeling the magic in them and ready to spread it.







As a Data Analyst, your project would typically include:

Collecting, cleaning, and transforming data from various sources to ensure quality and usability
Writing and optimizing SQL queries and/or using Python to analyze and process data
Building and maintaining dashboards and reports (e.g. Power BI) to support business decision-making
Translating business needs into data requirements and actionable insights
Performing exploratory data analysis to identify trends, patterns, and opportunities
Collaborating with data engineers and other teams to ensure data availability and reliability
Contributing to the improvement of data models, datasets, and reporting processes
Ensuring data accuracy, consistency, and documentation of your work
Supporting stakeholders by explaining insights in a clear and structured way




You’re a step closer to joining our team if you bring:




Background:

Masters degree related to computer science, data or AI
1-4 years of experience in a data role
Previous experience building or maintaining data pipelines and ETL/ELT processes.
Exposure to working with large datasets from multiple sources (e.g., CRM, web analytics, call logs, transactional systems).

Technical Skills:

Solid hands-on experience with Python, and SQL.
Experience with SAS is a plus.
Experience with Databricks is a plus.
Familiarity with data warehousing concepts and best practices.
Experience integrating reporting tools such as Power BI.
Basic understanding of version control (e.g., Git) and automated workflows/scheduling.

Soft Skills:

Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking skills.
Ability to collaborate effectively with technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Good communication skills and attention to detail.
Proactive mindset with a willingness to learn and grow in a fast-moving environment.




Practical Info:

Languages: Native in French or Dutch and fluent in English




We know that finding the right job isn’t just about the role, it’s about what’s in it for you, too. While we’re a start-up, we’re big on taking care of our people right from day one.




Here’s a sneak peek at what we offer:




💰 A compensation package that keeps you motivated

Competitive salary
Mobility budget or company car with a fuel card
30 days of paid time off
A top-tier laptop & smartphone with a subscription
Representation allowances
Hospitalization & dental insurance
Meal vouchers
Opportunity to earn company stock over time




🎯 A place to be your best self, grow, and thrive

Work with the most innovative technologies in Data & AI
Work in an agile, collaborative environment
Hybrid work model
Monthly team-building events (plus one epic annual celebration)
Tailored training programs to fuel your career growth
A cool, ergonomic office with creative meeting spaces and a 24/7 fully equiped gym
A Nintendo Switch for spontaneous Mario Kart battles 🎮
A massage chair for those deep-thinking moments 🧘
Fresh coffee & drinks to keep you energized ☕




✨ And most importantly, a growing company where opportunities are limitless!




Our Recruitment Process:

Quick intro call with our HR team
HR Interview
Technical Interview
Partner Meet-up
Potential Interview with a client




At Data Wizards, we value perspeverance, curiosity, creativity, integrity and excellence. In that sense, we are looking for passionate AI & data professionals who want to help companies navigate the transition the world is facing today, and who want to be part of the Wizard adventure we are building.




If you’re passionate about what we do but aren’t sure you meet every single requirement, don’t hesitate to apply. We value potential, mindset, and growth as much as experience. At Data Wizards, we believe diversity is our strength. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds and experiences because different viewpoints help us grow and evolve.




Let’s build the future of AI & Data, together🤝




Please note: As a consulting company, our recruitment process can be either project-driven or based on strong profiles we believe in. The consultancy world moves fast, and while we always aim to match great talent with the right opportunity, there might not always be an immediate fit. With your permission, we’ll gladly keep your profile in mind for future missions, and hope to collaborate with you soon on an exciting project at Data Wizards!

Title: Business Analyst Data & Scrum Master H/F
Description:
🧩 Darwin Partners, un véritable partenaire de carrière 🧩




Chez Darwin Partners, nous ne nous contentons pas de recruter : nous accompagnons chaque consultant dans son évolution professionnelle en lui proposant des missions qui correspondent à ses aspirations.

Avec une culture dynamique et axée sur l’impact, nous connectons les meilleurs talents IT à des projets ambitieux, tout en cultivant des relations humaines et authentiques.

👥 Nos clients ? Des entreprises innovantes dans différents secteurs d’activité (banque, assurance, finance, industrie, e-commerce, marchés publics, trading, médical ...) et des projets à forte valeur ajoutée sur différents métiers (étude & développement, fonctionnel, agilité, infrastructure, réseaux, data, cloud ...)

🤝 Notre engagement ? Un suivi régulier, une écoute active et une véritable proximité avec nos talents.

✨ Notre promesse ? Des projets enrichissants et une rémunération à la hauteur de votre talent.







23.$.Dans le cadre du renforcement d’une équipe agile au sein d’un acteur majeur du secteur financier basé à Bruxelles, nous recherchons un(e) Business/Data Analyst & Scrum Master afin d’accompagner des projets liés à l’Investment Management et aux environnements data.

Vous évoluerez dans un contexte international, orienté données et transformation digitale, avec une forte collaboration entre les équipes métiers et IT.




🔒 Vos missions 🔒

Recueillir, analyser et formaliser les besoins métiers et fonctionnels
Participer à l’analyse de données et à la compréhension des flux backend
Travailler sur des environnements SQL, API et datawarehouse
Assurer le lien entre les équipes métiers, data et techniques
Participer à la rédaction des spécifications fonctionnelles et techniques
Accompagner les équipes dans la compréhension des enjeux data
Animer les cérémonies Agile/Scrum de la squad
Suivre l’avancement des sujets et faciliter la collaboration entre les parties prenantes
Contribuer à l’amélioration continue des processus et méthodes de travail




🧠 Le profil que nous recherchons 🧠

Expérience de 3 à 8 ans en Business Analysis / Data Analysis
Très bonne expérience en analyse de données et compréhension des environnements data
Solides compétences sur SQL, API et environnements backend
Expérience en tant que Scrum Master et/ou certifications Scrum
Bonne compréhension des principes liés à la data et aux architectures datawarehouse
Une expérience dans le secteur financier est appréciée
Une connaissance des domaines Private Banking, Asset Management ou de l'assurance constitue un réel plus
Excellente communication et capacité à interagir avec des interlocuteurs variés
Anglais courant obligatoire
Français ou néerlandais courant requis




📍 Localisation : Bruxelles

📅 Démarrage : ASAP

📄 Contrat : CDI / Freelance / Portage salarial







💡 Ce qui fait notre différence au sein de Darwin Partners 💡

Une entreprise à taille humaine et smart, avec une approche personnalisée et bienveillante.
Près de 140 collaborateurs engagés au quotidien pour des projets à fort impact.
Des missions techniques et stratégiques, où vous aurez un vrai rôle à jouer.
Un accompagnement sur-mesure, avec des perspectives d’évolution concrètes.




📌 Notre processus de recrutement 📌

1️⃣ Premier échange RH – Pour parler de vous, de vos ambitions et de nos opportunités

2️⃣ Entretien technique & fonctionnel – Échange avec un manager ou un consultant senior

3️⃣ Entretien client – Rencontre avec l’entreprise partenaire pour valider le bon fit

📩 Prêt(e) à nous rejoindre ?

N’hésitez pas à postuler directement via cette annonce en cliquant sur “Candidature Simplifiée” !

Vous évoluerez dans un contexte international, orienté données et transformation digitale, avec une forte collaboration entre les équipes métiers et IT.


🔒 Vos missions 🔒

  • Recueillir, analyser et formaliser les besoins métiers et fonctionnels
  • Participer à l’analyse de données et à la compréhension des flux backend
  • Travailler sur des environnements SQL, API et datawarehouse
  • Assurer le lien entre les équipes métiers, data et techniques
  • Participer à la rédaction des spécifications fonctionnelles et techniques
  • Accompagner les équipes dans la compréhension des enjeux data
  • Animer les cérémonies Agile/Scrum de la squad
  • Suivre l’avancement des sujets et faciliter la collaboration entre les parties prenantes
  • Contribuer à l’amélioration continue des processus et méthodes de travail


🧠 Le profil que nous recherchons 🧠

  • Expérience de 3 à 8 ans en Business Analysis / Data Analysis
  • Très bonne expérience en analyse de données et compréhension des environnements data
  • Solides compétences sur SQL, API et environnements backend
  • Expérience en tant que Scrum Master et/ou certifications Scrum
  • Bonne compréhension des principes liés à la data et aux architectures datawarehouse
  • Une expérience dans le secteur financier est appréciée
  • Une connaissance des domaines Private Banking, Asset Management ou de l'assurance constitue un réel plus
  • Excellente communication et capacité à interagir avec des interlocuteurs variés
  • Anglais courant obligatoire
  • Français ou néerlandais courant requis


📍 Localisation : Bruxelles

📅 Démarrage : ASAP

📄 Contrat : CDI / Freelance / Portage salarial



💡 Ce qui fait notre différence au sein de Darwin Partners 💡

  • Une entreprise à taille humaine et smart, avec une approche personnalisée et bienveillante.
  • Près de 140 collaborateurs engagés au quotidien pour des projets à fort impact.
  • Des missions techniques et stratégiques, où vous aurez un vrai rôle à jouer.
  • Un accompagnement sur-mesure, avec des perspectives d’évolution concrètes.

2️⃣ Entretien technique & fonctionnel – Échange avec un manager ou un consultant senior

Title: Online Data Analyst in Belgium
Description:
Are you a detail-oriented individual with a passion for research and a good understanding of national and local geography? This freelance opportunity allows you to work at your own pace and from the comfort of your own home.




A Day in the Life of an Online Data Analyst:

In this role, you will be working on a project aimed at enhancing the content and quality of digital maps that are used by millions of people worldwide
Completing research and evaluation tasks in a web-based environment such as verifying and comparing data, and determining the relevance and accuracy of information.




Join us today and be part of a dynamic and innovative team that is making a difference in the world!




TELUS Digital AI Community

Our global AI Community is a vibrant network of 1 million+ contributors from diverse backgrounds who help our customers collect, enhance, train, translate, and localize content to build better AI models. Become part of our growing community and make an impact supporting the machine learning models of some of the world’s largest brands.







Qualification path




No previous professional experience is required to apply to this role, however, working on this project will require you to pass the basic requirements and go through a standard assessment process. This is a part-time long-term project and your work will be subject to our standard quality assurance checks during the term of this agreement.




Basic Requirements

Full Professional Proficiency in English & Dutch language
Being a resident in Belgium for the last 5 consecutive years and having familiarity with current and historical business, media, sport, news, social media, and cultural affairs in Belgium
Ability to follow guidelines and conduct online research using search engines, online maps, and website information
Flexibility to work across a diverse set of task types, including maps, news, audio tasks, and relevance
Daily access to a broadband internet connection, computer, and relevant software




Assessment

In order to be hired into the program, you’ll take an open book qualification exam that will determine your suitability for the position and complete ID verification. Our team will provide you with guidelines and learning materials before your qualification exam. You will be required to complete the exam in a specific timeframe but at your convenience.




You may also confirm your interest and send your CV directly via email to mailyn.esguerra@telusdigital.com with the subject line: Application for [Job Title] – LinkedIn, to ensure your application is promptly received and reviewed.
